title: Proxied UI Metadata
description: Canonical JSON Schema for proxied UI metadata used by Hexe Core for node and addon UI compatibility and routing decisions.

ui_base_url.description: Internal Core-reachable UI origin. Must never be treated as a browser-public URL.

ui_health_endpoint.description: Optional internal health endpoint for UI availability probing.

ui_supports_prefix.description: Whether the UI is known to work under a Core-owned public path prefix.

ui_entry_path.description: Prefix-local UI entry path relative to ui_base_url.
